name: Springerle
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat eggs until light.
2. Stir in powdered sugar and beat well.
3. Add anise extract, lemon peel, and the sifted baking powder and flour mixture.
4. Mix until smooth.
5. Chill for 1 hour.
6. Roll out to a thickness of one half inch on a floured board.
7. Press the springerle pin or mold into the dough, dusting with flour each time.
8. Optionally use Pam to prevent sticking.
9. Expose to air overnight.
10. Cut cookies apart and arrange on a baking sheet.
11. Bake at 350°F for about 30 minutes, ensuring they do not overbrown.
12. Note that not everyone appreciates the licorice flavor of anise; orange, lemon, or vanilla may be substituted if desired.
13. Store in a covered container with apple slices for up to 10 days before serving.
